title: The Mirror Of And
prompt: A dragon guards the hatch. Complete its proof to earn the key.
lore: The dragon's fire roars, and somewhere inside it you seem to hear every fear you have never spoken aloud.
help: This room holds 3 lemmas — finish them all (turn every wip into qed). (1) Helper. by and_intro(B, A) cases; and_right/and_left each then ⊢ A ∧ B; by both. (2) Uses and_comm. implication_intro then P := A ∧ B ⊢ B ∧ A; by and_comm(A, B, P);. (3) Uses and_comm_imp. biconditional_intro cases; by and_comm_imp(A, B); and by and_comm_imp(B, A);.
